title: Validation/generation gaps: issues unvalidated, stale views not pruned, unwrapped JSON.parse, cross-type id collisions
description: Audit findings (MED/LOW), grouped. (1) validate never schema-checks issue records (IssueRecord unused by validate); a corrupt/duplicate issue is never reported, yet orphan_thread resolution trusts issue filenames. (2) generateTaskViews never prunes stale view files (deleting a task leaves an orphan view forever) — non-idempotent output. (3) loadClaims/loadIssues call JSON.parse without try/catch, throwing a raw SyntaxError (not RecordError) that crashes activeClaimForTask during claim/release/finish. (4) duplicate ids are detected per-record-type only; cross-type id collisions (task vs issue) are accepted and can mis-resolve thread references. (5) findProjectRoot treats a FILE named .waystation as the root. (6) recordExists accepts YAML files that loaders never read, so validate can say 'fine' while the index omits the record.
expected: All record types validate on read with coded errors; generation is idempotent; id uniqueness is global where it matters.
actual: Issues unvalidated; orphan views accumulate; raw parse crashes; cross-type id collisions unhandled.
next_steps: Validate issues (schema + duplicate id) in validateLedger.
Prune view files not backed by a current record.
Wrap loadClaims/loadIssues parse in RecordError like records.ts readJson.
Detect cross-type id collisions; make findProjectRoot require a directory.
